value_proposition: Provides a centralized platform for viewing and tracking missions or tasks.
problem_solved: Organizing and viewing missions/tasks assigned to a user, providing a single point of access for mission details.

features.name: Login
features.description: Allows existing users to access their missions.

features.name: Mission Dashboard
features.description: Displays a list of missions assigned to the logged-in user (based on observed screenshots).

features.name: Email/Password Registration
features.description: Enables new users to create an account with their email and password.

features.name: Social Login
features.description: Allows users to login with Google, Facebook, and Github accounts.

competitive_positioning: The application likely competes with existing task management and project management tools, offering a simplified view focused on individual mission assignments. The exact competitive positioning depends on the features available after login that are not visible prior to logging in.
key_differentiators: Potentially a simplified or focused mission view (assumption)
Possibly team-based mission management (based on 'Danchou' reference, needs confirmation)
